title: Help!
why_this_song: Help! by The Beatles (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I do appreciate you being 'round
Help me get my feet back on the ground
Won't you please, please help me?
And now my life has changed in oh so many ways

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "help" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "help" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "please" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "please" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And I do appreciate you being 'round
I never needed anybody's help in any way

exercises.prompt_en: "Help!" was released in 1965. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Help!" foi lançada em 1965. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Help!" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Help!" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Beatles one question about "Help!", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Beatles sobre "Help!", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Help!" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Help!" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
